title: I have imported from my Windows desktop program to Thunderbird Android App, but existing messages are not appearing, only new ones.
creator: thecoombes
content:
I have imported from my Windows desktop program to Thunderbird Android App using the QR code, but existing messages are not appearing, only new ones.

Regards Jim
